cards.title: Initialize Project Scaffolding
cards.body: Repository contains only baseline files. Determine tech stack (frontend framework, backend framework, database), create package.json with core dependencies, and scaffold src/ directory structure. Activepieces is a Node.js-based automation platform with a React UI and 280+ integrations — baseline should include integration test infrastructure.

cards.title: Create CLAUDE.md & Project Context
cards.body: Document architectural decisions, commit conventions, testing strategy (unit/integration/e2e for integrations), and CI/CD requirements. This is a 21K+ star open-source project — early documentation prevents technical debt and scales contributor onboarding.

cards.title: Add test suite to agent spec system
cards.body: 36 source files exist with zero tests. For an agent/automation specification layer, untested logic poses high risk of spec inconsistencies and behavioral bugs. Establish baseline coverage on critical agent decision logic and workflow validation. This is blocking quality confidence before the next phase.

cards.title: Create CLAUDE.md with project conventions
cards.body: No project-specific context file. Document the spec format, testing approach, file organization, and git workflow so contributors (including future you) follow consistent patterns. This is lightweight setup with high payoff for maintainability.

cards.title: Add Test Suite (0→80% coverage)
cards.body: 11 source files (app.py, feedback-widget.js, etc.) have zero test coverage. Create tests/ directory, set up pytest + vitest, and establish >80% baseline. This is blocking production readiness per your quality gates in execution-discipline.md.

cards.title: Consolidate Stale Changelog Entries
cards.body: CHANGELOG-PENDING.md has 6 unpublished entries aged 7 days. Merge into CHANGELOG.md and clear pending file. Indicates changelog-tracker hook is not enforcing consolidation per your post-commit policy.

cards.title: Zero test coverage on spec validation engine
cards.body: A 54-file specification validation platform has no tests. For a tool that validates Excel specs against complex rules, this is a critical correctness gap. Start with integration tests on the validation core (likely frontend/backend boundary), targeting 60%+ coverage. This should block further feature development.

cards.title: CHANGELOG-PENDING backlog accumulating
cards.body: 26 unpublished entries over 7 days—consolidation is not happening as part of the commit workflow. Add a pre-commit check or end-of-sprint consolidation ritual. Root cause is likely that CLAUDE.md syncs are happening without the corresponding CHANGELOG review.

cards.title: No test suite for dashboard API
cards.body: claude-mobile has 6 source files (Express routes, WebSocket handlers, voice pipelines) with zero test coverage. This blocks confidence in production deployment and makes refactoring risky. Recommend jest + supertest for HTTP API, ws + sinon for WebSocket events, and at least 60% coverage for core paths before release.

cards.title: 6 uncommitted changes block release
cards.body: Pending file changes indicate incomplete work cycles. Commit with semantic messages (feat/fix), then consolidate the 11-entry CHANGELOG-PENDING backlog into CHANGELOG.md and tag a release. This unblocks version tracking and deployment.

cards.title: CHANGELOG-PENDING stale for 7 days
cards.body: 11 unpublished changelog entries accumulated since 2026-04-09, suggesting either a blocked release or skipped version bumps. Consolidate into CHANGELOG.md with a semantic version tag (e.g., v1.2.0 for Whisper integration feature).

cards.title: Commit 17 uncommitted changes before they diverge
cards.body: 14 days have passed since the last commit (2026-04-02) despite 17 active file changes. This breaks commit history continuity and makes debugging difficult. Batch uncommitted changes into logical commits with semantic messages (feat/fix/refactor) and push today.

cards.title: Add smoke tests for PPTX generation
cards.body: 8 source files generating branded PowerPoint presentations with zero test coverage. Start with 3 tests: file creation, template + token injection, and output validation. This unblocks confident iteration and catches silent failures.

cards.title: Publish 7-day-old changelog backlog
cards.body: CHANGELOG-PENDING.md has 7 unpublished entries dated 2026-04-09. Move into CHANGELOG.md and establish a weekly publication ritual (e.g., every Friday) to keep documentation in sync with commits.

cards.title: Add README.md
cards.body: Project lacks README documentation. Add purpose statement (Yearly Reviews management), local setup steps, and key features. This is especially important for a Review-phase project where clarity on objectives drives quality.

cards.title: Zero Test Coverage on Scraper
cards.body: 93 source files with 0 tests. Core risk: Rightmove parser changes and financial filtering logic have no safety net. A single HTML structure change or logic bug silently breaks daily runs. Recommend starting with unit tests for the financial criteria evaluator and parser, then add integration tests for end-to-end property filtering.

cards.title: Stale Changelog Pending
cards.body: CHANGELOG-PENDING.md has 2 entries from 25 days ago (circa 2026-03-22). These should have been consolidated into CHANGELOG.md on the next commit. Consolidate now and update CLAUDE.md hooks if the automatic changelog consolidation isn't firing.

cards.title: Resolve uncommitted changes (67 files pending)
cards.body: 67 uncommitted file changes violate git-workflow.md execution discipline. Review `git status`, semantically commit valid changes (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`), and discard exploratory work. Once resolved, enforce checkpoint commits before multi-file refactors.

cards.title: Consolidate documentation backlog (7-day-old CHANGELOG)
cards.body: CHANGELOG-PENDING.md has 139 unpublished entries (7 days old) and DOC-UPDATE-NEEDED.md is still flagged. Per doc-with-commits hook protocol: consolidate pending changes into CHANGELOG.md and resolve all DOC-UPDATE-NEEDED flags before next commit.

cards.title: Test coverage baseline (1.1% → target 60%+)
cards.body: Only 1 test file covers 88 source files. Focus on critical paths: API routes (day-plan, activity, automation), state transforms, and dashboard data aggregation. Use existing GoogleTest patterns from C++ projects or set up Jest for Next.js.

cards.title: Consolidate stale changelog entries
cards.body: CHANGELOG-PENDING.md accumulates 6 entries over 7 days without publication. Consolidate into CHANGELOG.md immediately and establish a weekly automation (CronCreate) to prevent future backlog. This maintains project transparency and avoids lossy churn in the commit history.

cards.title: Commit 13 uncommitted changes before review approval
cards.body: 13 files remain uncommitted as of 2026-04-15 (last commit 2026-04-15T17:31:09Z). Review phase cannot be closed with dirty working tree. Likely includes recent doc updates (UKCAUD-BUG-AND-QA-PROCESS.md, ukcaud-qa-feedback-epic-pattern.md) and state changes. Stage and commit with semantic message.

cards.title: Expand test suite from 3 to 15+ files for review-phase standards
cards.body: Current 8% test-to-source ratio (3 tests / 39 sources) is below acceptable quality gates for review phase. Recent commits (feat: thematic template grouping, fix: HAT/AQA narrative) suggest feature maturity but no corresponding test additions. Target 20%+ coverage ratio (12–15 test files) before final approval.

cards.title: Audit .gitignore: exclude generated outputs and state files
cards.body: Multiple cached output directories committed (outputs/ai-analysis-cache/, outputs/ceremony-prep/, .omc/state/) containing auto-generated artifacts. Review which should be .gitignored vs. tracked. eod sync commits suggest these regenerate frequently, risking repository bloat and noise in history.

cards.title: Zero Test Coverage on 51 Files
cards.body: This tool has 51 source files (API, frontend, comparison logic) with no test files present. For a template comparison system in Review phase, this is a critical quality risk — template correctness directly impacts user workflows. Create a test foundation starting with API integration tests, then template comparison logic, then UI.

cards.title: CHANGELOG-PENDING Consolidation Debt
cards.body: 20 entries have been pending for 7 days. This blocks the documentation hook workflow and signals stalled review hygiene. Move all entries into CHANGELOG.md in a single commit to restore clean state.

cards.title: Publish Pending Changelog Entries
cards.body: CHANGELOG-PENDING.md contains 6 unpublished entries dated ~7 April 2026. Per your documentation-with-commits hook, these should be consolidated into CHANGELOG.md before next session. This is low-friction but blocks changelog hygiene.

cards.title: Add test suite for scraper
cards.body: Zero test coverage for news scraping logic, Google News authentication, and RSS fallback. Session auth is a critical external dependency that can fail silently. Add unit tests for parsing, integration tests for session refresh, and CI job to validate daily scrape workflow.

cards.title: Automate changelog consolidation
cards.body: CHANGELOG-PENDING.md has 20 entries accumulating (8 days). Implement weekly cron to consolidate pending entries into CHANGELOG.md or add a pre-commit hook to consolidate on each commit. Prevents manual backlog management.
